name: CEMENTO-OSSEOUS DYSPLASIA
definition: CEMENTOMA = FIBROOSTEOMA nonneoplastic benign hamartoma associated with tooth apex diffuse form of periapical cemento-osseous dysplasia

demographics.Histo: proliferation of connective tissue within periodontal membrane
demographics.Age: 4th-5th decade; in woman: black / Asian descent
demographics.Associated with: vital nonrestored tooth + intact lamina dura

discriminating_features: one / more, closely apposed / confluent, round / ovoid lucent lesion with varying amounts of
later mixed lysis + sclerosis with varying amounts of opacity; little expansion
periapical sclerotic sharply marginated area NOT fused to tooth

general: one / more, closely apposed / confluent, round / ovoid lucent lesion with varying amounts of
later mixed lysis + sclerosis with varying amounts of opacity; little expansion
periapical sclerotic sharply marginated area NOT fused to tooth
